description: School event: newsletter brief mention, then dedicated email with volunteer needs and schedule

actual.title: Spring Science Fair
actual.description: Annual science fair showcasing student projects. Grades 3-5 projects on display. Volunteers needed for setup at 4pm. Light refreshments provided. Awards ceremony at 6:30pm. Parking in west lot.

content_parts.text:
You are merging calendar event data from multiple emails.

**Existing Event:**
- Title: Spring Science Fair
- Start: 2026-05-14T17:00:00
- End: 2026-05-14T19:00:00
- All Day: False
- Location: Lincoln Elementary School
- Description: Annual science fair showcasing student projects
- Importance: action_required

**New Information (source type: update):**
- Title: Spring Science Fair
- Start: 2026-05-14T17:00:00
- End: 2026-05-14T19:00:00
- All Day: False
- Location: Lincoln Elementary School - Main Gymnasium
- Description: Grades 3-5 projects on display. Volunteers needed for setup at 4pm. Light refreshments provided. Awards ceremony at 6:30pm. Parking in west lot.
- Importance: action_required

**Merge Rules:**
1. If source_type is "cancellation", prefix title with "CANCELLED: " (if not already)
2. Prefer specific time (e.g., 6-7pm) over all-day
3. Combine descriptions, keeping all relevant info (append new info)
4. Use most specific location (longer address usually better)
5. Keep newer times if they differ (updates)
6. For importance: keep the highest level (action_required > fyi)

Output JSON with merged event data:
{
    "title": "...",
    "start_datetime": "...",
    "end_datetime": "...",
    "all_day": true/false,
    "location": "...",
    "description": "...",
    "importance": "action_required" or "fyi"
}
